LanguageData.EndorsedByRecruiter.stages.0.description: This person was recommended to me.
LanguageData.EndorsedByRecruiter.stages.0.label: endorsed by recruiter
LanguageData.GuestAngered.stages.0.description: These guys are trying to steal our members!
LanguageData.GuestAngered.stages.0.label: angered by recruitment
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.0.description: They don't even have beds here.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.0.label: no guest beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.1.description: There should be more beds for guests.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.1.label: not enough guest beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.2.description: There are enough beds in our room for all of us.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.2.label: enough beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.3.label: lots of beds
LanguageData.GuestCantAffordBed.stages.0.description: I can't afford one of the beds.
LanguageData.GuestCantAffordBed.stages.0.label: can't afford a bed
LanguageData.GuestCheapFood.stages.0.description: I could buy cheap food at a dispenser.
LanguageData.GuestCheapFood.stages.0.label: cheap food
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.0.description: My bed was free so I can't complain.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.0.label: free bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.1.description: My bed was absurdly more expensive than what it's worth.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.1.label: extremely overpriced bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.2.description: My bed was way too expensive for what it's worth.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.2.label: overpriced bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.3.description: My bed was not worth the price.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.3.label: lame bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.4.description: The price for a bed is alright here.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.4.label: appropriate bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.5.description: My bed was a good deal.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.5.label: good value bed
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.6.description: My bed was an excellent deal!
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.6.label: great value bed
LanguageData.GuestDismissiveAttitude.stages.0.descrip: I'm done talking for now. Leave me alone.
LanguageData.GuestDismissiveAttitude.stages.0.label: tired of talking
LanguageData.GuestExpensiveFood.stages.0.description: I had to pay for expensive food at a dispenser.
LanguageData.GuestExpensiveFood.stages.0.label: expensive food
LanguageData.GuestHasNoFood.stages.0.description: I don't have anything to eat.
LanguageData.GuestHasNoFood.stages.0.label: no food
LanguageData.GuestOffendedRelationship.stages.0.label: insulted by colonist
LanguageData.GuestPleasedRelationship.stages.0.label: charmed by colonist
LanguageData.GuestRecruitmentForced.stages.0.descript: I'm not sure if I should be here.
LanguageData.GuestRecruitmentForced.stages.0.label: involuntarily recruited
